creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
Do you have any port options set?  Also, do you have anything in make.conf?  I don't have any 11-current systems so I can't really test this and the ports build cluster isn't reporting issues to me so I suspect it's something unique in your environment.

It does look like the error is in the LLD.  I might be able to disable that on 11 (the very in LLVM 3.7 probably isn't very useful).
